opening_turn.raw_input:
IMPORTANT: Write ALL player-visible narrative in German. Do not switch to French unless quoting in-world French text explicitly marked as a quotation. Opening turn for module god_of_carnage. Establish the starting situation in scene phase_1 (phase_1). Scene description: n/a. Cast: unknown. Write vivid but grounded opening narration within canonical module boundaries. Set initial dramatic pressure, social posture, and opening narrative threads.

Session opening (canonical direction/opening_sequence.yaml; ADR-0035). Anchor: Paris apartment, evening — hosts and guests meet over the incident between their children. Deliver THREE narrator beats in order before any NPC speech: (1) narrator_intro — background/premise: the configured triggering incident and why these adults meet; (2) role_anchor — inner-perception narrator that places annette in the scene (who they are, their place in this room, their disposition at the start); (3) scene_setup — the Paris salon: physical space, ritual objects, social temperature. Use three narrator paragraphs (blank line between each) or three gm_narration strings. Prefer JSON field narration_summary as a list of exactly three strings, e.g. "narration_summary": ["narrator_intro: …", "role_anchor: …", "scene_setup: …"]. After all three beats, scene targets phase_1; keep NPC lines aligned with that phase. Opening knowledge contract goc_opening_sequence_v1 requires events ['event_01_triggering_incident', 'event_02_adult_consequence', 'event_03_arrival_threshold', 'event_04_apartment_as_stage', 'event_05_role_anchor', 'event_06_first_playable_moment'] and must_establish ['triggering_incident', 'adult_consequence', 'reason_for_meeting', 'apartment_as_social_stage', 'selected_player_role_presence', 'first_playable_moment']. Emit structured coverage evidence as "opening_event_ids" with the covered event ids; semantic rule hits, when present, must use "runtime_gate_detections" ids. Hard forbidden detection: reject_on=['forced_player_speech', 'npc_world_explanation', 'meta_runtime_language', 'source_text_reproduction', 'player_agency_violation'], recover_on=['abstract_theme_dump', 'stage_direction_labels', 'summary_only_opening', 'npc_phase_one_premature_escalation']. Apply hard-forbidden rules by their authored ids; narrator owns spatial/premise establishment.

metadata.primary_attempt_raw_output_excerpt: {"schema_version":"runtime_actor_turn_v1","narration_summary":["Zwei Knaben geraten auf dem Schulhof aneinander; aus Spott wird ein Schlag, aus dem Streit wird eine Verletzung, und die Erwachsenen sitzen nun in einer Pariser Wohnung zusammen, weil ein Abend unter Höflichkeit das nicht mehr verdecken

character_mind_records.formal_role_label: Guest; Annette's spouse; mediator, conflict manager (hosts are Véronique and Michel in their home)

planner_state_projection.note: Derived projection of RuntimeTurnState planner fields — not a second truth surface.

dramatic_outcome.social_outcome: Die Sitzung beginnt höflich, aber mit deutlich gespannter Gastgeber- und Gästeordnung.
dramatic_outcome.dramatic_direction: Phase 1 ist eröffnet; der erste heikle Austausch steht kurz bevor.

gm_narration: Zwei Paare treffen sich in einer Pariser Wohnung wegen ihrer Kinder. Der Vorfall geschah auf dem Schulhof; was hier geschieht, soll im Salon entschieden werden.
Du bist Annette Reille. Die Wohnung gehört dir, und mit ihr die Erwartung, dass dieser Abend zivilisiert verläuft — das Treffen war deine Idee.

Der Salon: vier Stühle um einen niedrigen Tisch. Kunstbände und Tulpen signalisieren überlegten Geschmack. Auf einem Tablett stehen Espressotassen, die niemand bisher berührt hat. Niemand hat sich gesetzt.

scene_blocks.text: Zwei Paare treffen sich in einer Pariser Wohnung wegen ihrer Kinder. Der Vorfall geschah auf dem Schulhof; was hier geschieht, soll im Salon entschieden werden.
Du bist Annette Reille. Die Wohnung gehört dir, und mit ihr die Erwartung, dass dieser Abend zivilisiert verläuft — das Treffen war deine Idee.

Der Salon: vier Stühle um einen niedrigen Tisch. Kunstbände und Tulpen signalisieren überlegten Geschmack. Auf einem Tablett stehen Espressotassen, die niemand bisher berührt hat. Niemand hat sich gesetzt.
You keep turning this into a legal question. It is not a legal question.
Alain glances at his phone but does not pick it up yet.

blocks.text: Zwei Paare treffen sich in einer Pariser Wohnung wegen ihrer Kinder. Der Vorfall geschah auf dem Schulhof; was hier geschieht, soll im Salon entschieden werden.
Du bist Annette Reille. Die Wohnung gehört dir, und mit ihr die Erwartung, dass dieser Abend zivilisiert verläuft — das Treffen war deine Idee.

Der Salon: vier Stühle um einen niedrigen Tisch. Kunstbände und Tulpen signalisieren überlegten Geschmack. Auf einem Tablett stehen Espressotassen, die niemand bisher berührt hat. Niemand hat sich gesetzt.

observability_path_summary.raw_player_input:
IMPORTANT: Write ALL player-visible narrative in German. Do not switch to French unless quoting in-world French text explicitly marked as a quotation. Opening turn for module god_of_carnage. Establish the starting situation in scene phase_1 (phase_1). Scene description: n/a. Cast: unknown. Write vivid but grounded opening narration within canonical module boundaries. Set initial dramatic pressure, social posture, and opening narrative threads.

Session opening (canonical direction/opening_sequence.yaml; ADR-0035). Anchor: Paris apartment, evening — hosts and guests meet over the incident between their children. Deliver THREE narrator beats in order before any NPC speech: (1) narrator_intro — background/premise: the configured triggering incident and why these adults meet; (2) role_anchor — inner-perception narrator that places annette in the scene (who they are, their place in this room, their disposition at the start); (3) scene_setup — the Paris salon: physical space, ritual objects, social temperature. Use three narrator paragraphs (blank line between each) or three gm_narration strings. Prefer JSON field narration_summary as a list of exactly three strings, e.g. "narration_summary": ["narrator_intro: …", "role_anchor: …", "scene_setup: …"]. After all three beats, scene targets phase_1; keep NPC lines aligned with that phase. Opening knowledge contract goc_opening_sequence_v1 requires events ['event_01_triggering_incident', 'event_02_adult_consequence', 'event_03_arrival_threshold', 'event_04_apartment_as_stage', 'event_05_role_anchor', 'event_06_first_playable_moment'] and must_establish ['triggering_incident', 'adult_consequence', 'reason_for_meeting', 'apartment_as_social_stage', 'selected_player_role_presence', 'first_playable_moment']. Emit structured coverage evidence as "opening_event_ids" with the covered event ids; semantic rule hits, when present, must use "runtime_gate_detections" ids. Hard forbidden detection: reject_on=['forced_player_speech', 'npc_world_explanation', 'meta_runtime_language', 'source_text_reproduction', 'player_agency_violation'], recover_on=['abstract_theme_dump', 'stage_direction_labels', 'summary_only_opening', 'npc_phase_one_premature_escalation']. Apply hard-forbidden rules by their authored ids; narrator owns spatial/premise establishment.

observability_path_summary.primary_attempt_raw_output_excerpt: {"schema_version":"runtime_actor_turn_v1","narration_summary":["Zwei Knaben geraten auf dem Schulhof aneinander; aus Spott wird ein Schlag, aus dem Streit wird eine Verletzung, und die Erwachsenen sitzen nun in einer Pariser Wohnung zusammen, weil ein Abend unter Höflichkeit das nicht mehr verdecken

module_scope_truth.support_note: God of Carnage is the only fully wired live story module in this runtime lane; other module ids must be reported honestly until module-general support is implemented.

runtime_truth_surface.truth_surface_note: These fields describe the active live runtime lane. Loaded package or preview state is not live authority; see /api/internal/narrative/runtime/state for loader state.
